No docs/PHASEREPORT.md, no .next/, no .claude/.

checks.evidence: §12.4 Autonomous scope + §12.5 Approval gates + §12.6 STOP conditions together mirror the pipeline's 5-step INTAKE→DECOMPOSE→EXECUTE→REVIEW→DONE with explicit operator gates for kernel-doc edits, cron registration, and mirror topology changes.

summary: All 15 checks PASS. Doc Hygiene Goal Loop (Phase 3) is now a permanent Agent OS lane, parallel to Security & PM2 Watch, with §12 ROUTING-RULES entry (additive), Agent OS overview lane doc, top-level PHASEREPORT entry, rehydrated Goal card (t_f42ecbe1) + Phase 3 parent (t_811e342d), Step-5 verdict, and a registration card (t_ab6bee19).
